name: 1 GM Cyclophosphamide Injection IP
about: GM Cyclophosphamide Injection IP is a liquid drug used for chemotherapy treatment. It contains 1gm of Cyclophosphamide which is a type of alkylating agent that works by interfering with the DNA replication process of cancer cells. This injection is commonly prescribed by doctors for the treatment of various types of cancer such as leukemia, lymphoma, and breast cancer. It is important to store this injection in a dry and cool place to maintain its effectiveness. As this drug is an injection, it should only be administered by a healthcare professional or under the guidance of a doctor. The dosage guidelines for this injection are as per the doctors suggestion.
